channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: HODL and buy more BTC. — 47 replies — 188.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
HODL and buy more BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-05-21 11:36 UTC

OP

If you still don’t own any Bitcoin yet, anon what the hell are you waiting for?

>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway. I’d rather have BTC long term than let my money rot in a savings account.

Early replies (first 3)

62245757
i get 5btc later for cheaper but thanks for the advice!

62245760
>>62245741
Too eqrly but yeah and avoid cex or at least take it out as fast as u can!

62246438
>>62245757
How much BTC are you holding right now anon?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62251176
>>62247257
>All in on BTC and BOTZ
Why BOTZ?

62252318
>>62247324
What about an altcoins?

62252439
>>62245741
Hey op, I hope your message finds some newfag lurking right now. Bitcoin is the next bitcoin.

62252472
No coiner here.
I’m a poorfag can you give me two good reasons why I should buy bitcoin instead of (no soft shilling) when it and (no soft shilling) are the new system? It seems to me that all that market cap will move onto the (no soft shilling).

62252488
>>62245741
i need IT below 50k or iam not buying

62252859
>>62252472
What will you shill for bitcoin when it's the #1 mcap

62252912
>>62245741
Waiting for an actual capable organization to release something similar so its actually a crime if someone steals it.

62252970
>>62252488
Better buy now and hodl goy

62253489
>>62252970
Holding is good but native BTC utility is getting bigger too. Better if your BTC is being staked instead of just sitting idle the whole cycle.

62253499
>>62247434
As long as you have a plan and targets, you’re already ahead of most emotional traders.

62253652
>>62253489

This is the way. And diversify. Coins like Monero and Nerva are private like cash, and in the case of Nerva it can't even be centralized/pooled due to how it changes algorithms. TRX is another for the list because it has the highest concentration of stablecoin transactions. Don't stick to just one asset: treat them like stocks.

62254516
>>62250313
What's your basis for that?

62254625
>>62246438
This much, and heres my home address. Theres a wrench in the top drawer in the kitchen, my room is upstairs and to the left.

62256658
>>62253489
I don't think we can stake btc
>>62253652
Why people are crazy about monero?

62256668
>>62254625
You're poor and you don't have even 1 btc in your wallet.

62256679
>>62252472
You should buy btc and treat as your savings

62256924
>>62253652
Monero is fine but nerva? The nerve

62256993
>>62256658
You probably don’t know much about Babylon yet, that’s why you’re asking that.
And if they’re into Monero then yeah, privacy is obviously the priority.

62256998
>>62250366
Btc is the king!!

62257164
>>62252912
What the hell are you talking about?

62257170
>>62256993
If it's centralised services, it's a big NO

62257173
>>62247257
Add ICP and Ethereum

62257204
>>62257170
Nah. Don’t trust centralized offerings anymore.
We’ve already seen how those end up. Fully decentralized + self custody + native BTC is the way kek.

62257209
>>62252439
A lot of people will realize that too late desu.

62257223
>>62245741
fact, he's still hodling

62257253
>>62257223
Is he satoshit?

62257345
>>62257173
ICp? Lol

62257392
>>62257204
but everything in defi is hype

62257440
>>62257223

62257675
>>62245741
>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway.
BTC doesn't improve any of this. Its cheaper and easier to spend gold.

item.title: TWENTY (20) LINK fuddie threads in the catalog — 74 replies — 65.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
TWENTY (20) LINK fuddie threads in the catalog

Open thread • Replies: 74 • Updated: 2026-05-21 10:31 UTC

OP

Why are they so riled up?

Early replies (first 3)

62244594
>they

its a dysgenic thing, who knows

62244608
Boom status?

62244615
>>62244587
You do know that those threads are made by link holders right?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62247620
>>62247440
tl;dr = fuck every single stink

62247642
>>62247251
Price and chart. Thats literally it. Nothing else matters besides the price.
If the price was $1000, fud couldnt exist

62247656
>>62244587
>fuddie
they're just mocking you, they're not "fud'ing"

62248459
>>62247642
>If the price was $1000, fud couldnt exist
HAHAHAHAHAHAHA
You must be new here.

When price is high: topped out, top signal, dump imminent, no room to grow
When price is low: price & chart, dead altcoin, dino coin, tnn etc

No marketing: radio silence, no transparency, no communication
Marketing: top signal, cringe, reeks of desperarion

Small team: two man team, russian scam, no offices
Big team: 700 HR roasties, zoom calls will be the end of you

LINK is a security: banks can’t touch it, illegal to use, adoption impossible
LINK is a commodity: no investor protection, insiders can legally rugpull you

62248467
>>62247391
What shilling?
There hasn't been a link shill thread in years

62248470
>>62248467
KABOOOOOOOOM
fxcking bullish link kaboom

62248532
>>62246964
Do you have any idea how unnatural it is for someone like you to be aware of deep lore like this?

>>62246257
Just mention XRP in a Link thread and he will appear.
Like I said, he is most likely just another larp by the same schizophrenic nutcase who spams under the Thomas/Adem larp.

62248535
We do this because you linkfags keep shitting on XRP forcing that shitty "boom" meme

Go fuck yourselves

62248561
>>62247642
Pic is fud spam from the spring of 2020, when Link had been beating the market for nearly two years straight.
Price has nothing to do with the fud spam.

If you read the fud, it's about Coinbase teaming up with Compound to make their own oracle, making Chainlink not needed.
No points for guessing what happened soon after.

62248593
>>62248561
such KABOOOOOOOOOM
fxckings bullish link

62248620
>>62248535
>>62248593
The boom meme is only a few months old, xerpies have been spamming Link fud religiously for nearly a decade.
Also the boom thing is from xerpies spamming that shit in Swift tweet comments.

62250765
>>62246964
fud harder cuck, massa's gonna liquidate you
>>62247391
use a filter bitch

62250818
>>62248561
>No points for guessing what happened soon after.


you lost 50% since then while every other market hit all time highs

62251273
>>62247391
>the fud is boring? how about the shilling?
what shilling you nigger piece of shit, there is 20 fud threads daily for literal years

62251282
>>62244587
Most link fud comes from neurotic holders that are down tens of thousands of dollars whom are pissed off

62251321
>>62244587
they want you to sell real bad, something big is almost here

62251336
>>62251282
rookie numbers but no, most LINK fud comes from paid jeets / nigerians

62251343
>>62251336
cope
it's copers & seethers
such as yourself, stinkie :}
we know your type

62251345
>>62251343
oh this ones riled up

62251349
>>62244587
the only "people" (bots) "buying" (posting about) chainlink are stuck in a reply loop with other "people" (bots)

62251351
>>62244594
10/10 pic

62251357
>>62244587
OOOOOOO, They chimpin out!

62251359
>>62248459
0 gains for 7 years is exactly why youre so bothered by "fud"

62252169
>>62247391
filter it then so you'll never have to see a thread about something you "don't care" about again.
>>62251359
riled
>>62251343
riled up!

62252468
>>62244594
HAHAHAHAH MY SIDES
THE AVENGERS

62252475
>>62251282
>tens of thousands
if only it was that little

62252496
>>62251357
>>62252468
>$9
THE cuckolds of crypto are SEETHING

62254089
>>62252475
they are really poor, actually it's probably less

62257538
bump

62257554
>>62244587
Its automated botspam, you retard. This board is 99% of all posts and threads 4chan internal spam bots

item.title: how do LINK shills refute this? — 51 replies — 31.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
how do LINK shills refute this?

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-05-21 10:00 UTC

OP

how do LINK shills refute this?

Early replies (first 3)

62240980
>>62240977
Self checked

62240982
>>62240977
cringe CLL meme. price + chart + take the L

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62244930
>>62244925
sorry xrp would have been 5x, btc would be like 12-15x

62244939
>>62244013
I'm making money on tech while also holding link. It's not really bag holding because I bought at 30 cent

62244943
>>62244925
>>62244930
LINK has outperformed XRP.
Cope all you want, it's just the facts.

62245194
>>62240980
Act like you belong here fagbag. Self checking is reddit

62245221
>>62244943
kek
full tard detected
>no wonder your in shitlink

62245265
>>62245221
WoW dud you are right!
Just market sold all my stinks!

62245492
>>62244357
>I have 40k LINK staked since v0.1

you're down 1.6 million

>i dont post alpha here

bro you can be honest... you have no alpha

62245509
>>62244943
>LINK has outperformed XRP.

not lately... xrp went 7x in the '25 run whereas link could barely double

it's funny watching the cult gaslight their newer members for not getting in early on the pyramid scheme. really smart community decision to shit all over your investors. then they're shocked there's no new buyers

62245517
>>62245492
You've been spending literal years of your life comparing other people's ROI like this.

62245520
>>62242019
OK link me to anyone with a portfolio anywhere on the entire internet with bnb that's 5 or 6 figures. You can't because they don't exist, this board is trash so what's your alternative, twitter where they openly run scams? Reddit where they're years behind everything (gme started here, reddit only picked it up at the very end)?

62245534
>>62245517
Its because they're comparing their own ROI to what they think they could have had. They all hold link. They're just too dumb to understand the complexity of the market and think its as simple as "someone smarter than me bought the better asset!", as if everyone here could have just bought BNB 6 years ago and been millionaires. When everyone DOES buy, like trumpcoin, it rugs immediately.

62245561
>>62245534
>They're just too dumb to understand the complexity of the market and think its as simple as "someone smarter than me bought the better asset!"
I think it's a lot dumber than that even, they're blaming the project for the market.
Basically pic related.

62245695
>>62244013
How many of the OGs actually held until now?

62245721
With picrel. Image from 3 days ago, but whatever.

62245775
fuck link chuddies

62245782
>>62244013
I'm still here taking a shit from my venice hotel room rn. Link will moon, you will see. It's just taking longer than expected. Which is a golden opportunity for those who missed the others.

62245800
>>62245517
>You've been spending literal years of your life comparing other people's ROI like this.

don't be so dramatic. it's an investment board. calculating gains/losses and opportunity cost is part of the discussion.


>>62245561
>I think it's a lot dumber than that even, they're blaming the project for the market.
>Basically pic related.

i think you have to tell yourself that lie in order to protect your ego. you have to tell yourself there's just no way an investor can't understand your genius play. they would have to be indian scammers to not see it

pretty juvenile thinking but i guess when you're down 5+ years straight and just missed the bull market, you have to come up with something

62245837
>>62245782
Literally nothing will pump this shitcoin, it will suffer the same fate as Kleros, an infinite permableed until a massive -50% wick destroys the spirit of remaining 2017 bagholders.
There are no net new big wallets, same baggies rotating the same bags, pretending staking yield makes up for a chart that looks like a stairway to hell.
Chainlink is one big permissioned, KYC'd, network, nobody with a crypto ethos wants to touch this trash with a 10-foot pole.
The biggest joke? LINK absorbed billions in TVL and still can't match LZ's volume.

62245840
>>62245721
>uncle rico bragging about gains from 7 years ago


bro we get it, you got some chicks' number in high school


the link cult is basically akin to boomers bragging about how they bought a house back in the day for $50k. they've conflated existing during a certain time period with having actual investment skill.

but that's the great thing about investing. even a blind squirrel finds a nut once in a while

62245849
Touch me

62246030
>>62244943
>>62245509
this
what the faggots don't realize is that xrp has had like 11 years for you to buy where you'd still be up and like 2 weeks in 2018 and last year to buy to be down
chainlink has had many more years for you to buy to be down and it's newer than xrp
thankfully I'm not down or I'd hate link (and myself) even more

62247125
>>62244939
>It's not really bag holding because I bought at 30 cent
you watched it do an inverse 10x, that qualifies

62248627
>>62247125
Projection by top buyers
LINK fuddies = top buyers

62248634
>>62248627
>2021
$53

>2026
$9

cuckoldry is a hell of a drug

62251394
>>62240967
the tokenomics and project development are better than the rest
#1 by development
chainlink reserve and payment abstraction mean the project growth and fees get converted into LINK

62254623
>>62240967 dude just bet on redcoin
>>62240992 kek

62254629
>>62245492
if you're so smart, show your trades asshole
turns out you make the best guesses you can like the rest of us
>redcoin.png

62256158
>>62244357
love it when stupid stankies brag about their OTHER gains lmaooooooo yeah cuz u ain't braggin about link that's for sure

62257462
>>62248634
case in point
fuddies = top buyers

62257467
>>62257462
>if you make fun of my shitcoin bags you bought the top
WE ARE THE CUUUCKOLD MARINES
WE CARRY THE BAGS
WE FIGHT FOR SERGEY
WE'LL HONOR HIS NAME

item.title: MARINES PLEASE DON'T SELL — 7 replies — 28.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
MARINES PLEASE DON'T SELL

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-05-21 11:31 UTC

OP

only 280 million tokens to go before we moon

Early replies (first 3)

62257619
>>62257606
Ok, I won't.

62257622
>>62257619
based and cuckpilled!

You're a true alpha warrior holder

62257626
>>62257622
Ok

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257628
>>62257622
>duuuude le hecking reverse psychology will make them sell for sure duuude

62257631
>>62257628
>muh reverse psychology and psyops
nigger I'm just here to mock your shitcoin bags lol

62257640
>>62257631
I'm still not selling though

62257666
The cuckolds of crypto

item.title: 3 years ago LINK cucks — 18 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
3 years ago LINK cucks

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-05-21 10:09 UTC

OP

were warning fuddies that they were going to hell and that Chainlink was about to moon (it was trading at $8). Yet here we are at $9

NEVER LISTEN TO LINK SHILLS

Early replies (first 3)

62252499
2023 feels like 80 years ago

62252762
>>62252494
CLL wil post another breadcrumb and the cuckolds will come up with a new meme date. I've seen baggies saying LINK will pump in Q4 now

62253363
>>62252494
BULGARIAN TRANNY PORN ADDICTS WANT TO STEAL MY PRECIOUS TOKENS!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62253371
>NEVER LISTEN TO LINK SHILLS

they are so dumb, they believe their own lies.

62253384
Never marry your bag.
I married eth in 2017.
It worked well until 2021.
Late 2021-2025 my nw did nothing while everything ripped
Finally sold in 2025, not ideal price, ~2000. I had 8k eth.
Already more than 2x everything by being free of eth, nw ~43M. Hype + semi stocks. I'm close to making it.

Divorce your link and escape the permanent underclass.

62253625
fuck stiiinks
hate em alll :}

62254257
>>62253625
this but unironically

62254486
>>62252494
Hahahahaha LINK baggots must be the most retarded bunch on /biz/

62254552
>duuuuuuuude i'm so dangerous

oh yeah how's that? you aren't even in shape right now

>duuuuuuuuude i'll hire hitmen to hunt you down

oh really wow, you must be connected to the underworld

>duuuuuuuuude being on the chans means i have secret powers!!

oh you mean a public website anyone in the world with internet can use? wow man you're nuts

>duuuuuude the world can't let me have 2 million dollars

interesting how it let memecoin holders, eth, early btc, etc all make money, but they decided to single out your cult

>duuuuuuuude that's because we'll take over the world!!

yeah man, "they" sure won't know what to do against "rich" people like that
ive said it before, but the incel revenge fantasy might be the most hilarious thing ever on this board

62254566
>>62252494
Man 2027 is Chainlink's baggieversary.
What should we prepare?
There has to be a big humiliation event.

62254577
>>62254566
Maybe a livestream of some sorts, top 10 biggest bagholder wallets.
A digest of all the memes, maybe try to get in touch with a baggie and have him on stage.

62254590
Well, fuddies are going to hell, unless they repent and turn from their wicked ways

62256219
>>62252494
this one's riled up

62256862
>>62254590
>shills a globohomo Saturnian token and the Great Reset
>thinks he’s going to heaven
NGMI

62257335
>>62254566
unironically $2

62257348
>>62256862
>>62256219
>>62254590
>>62256939
>>62257335
stupid baldie liscammer kill yourself this board is mine.

62257503
>>62256939
nico bully gf

item.title: BREAKING: Ripple Joins Chainlink's SCALE Program — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BREAKING: Ripple Joins Chainlink's SCALE Program

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-05-21 11:29 UTC

OP

>Ripple is thrilled to announce its participation in Chainlink’s SCALE program, a significant step toward enhancing blockchain interoperability and fostering innovation in financial services.
>By joining SCALE, Chainlink will contribute to the Ripple ecosystem, facilitating seamless access to real-time data and off-chain computation for smart contracts.
>Ripple’s recently launched stablecoin, $RLUSD, will also benefit from enhanced oracle connectivity, enabling greater transparency and reliability for its use in payment and settlement solutions within the TradFi ecosystem.

https://chainlinktoday.com/ripple-joins-chainlink-scale-with-all-chainlink-services-live-on-mainnet/

https://x.com/Ripple/status/1869461289273615724

Early replies (first 3)

62257616
Boom status?

62257648
>>62257595
DOUBLE BOOOOOOM

WE'RE FEELING EXTRA CUUCKY TODAY

62257663
>>62257595
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Polymarket whales scam people through UMA shitcoin — 9 replies — 9.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polymarket whales scam people through UMA shitcoin

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-05-21 10:40 UTC

OP

If you've ever bet on Polymarket and assumed the oracle that resolves
your market is anything close to decentralized, read this.

Full breakdown video: [YOUR YOUTUBE LINK]

A $17M market — "Will Trump say 'Iran' during events with Xi Jinping?" —
is being resolved right now by 10 wallets holding 95.3% of voting power.
That's 4.2% of voters carrying nearly all the weight. Round closes within
hours. Source: betmoar.fun [image in reply]

The evidence the answer should be YES is not subtle:

>White House Press Pool Note #5: Trump on the record saying "We did
discuss Iran. We don't want them to have a nuclear weapon" at 11:55 AM
Beijing on May 15
>Fox News live YouTube stream — isLiveContent=true, broadcast window
10:57 AM to 12:22 PM Beijing — fully encloses the moment
>TVB Hong Kong live, was_live confirmed, stream start 11:56:11 Beijing
>Kalshi (CFTC-regulated) resolved the IDENTICAL contract YES, no dispute
>The "Peng" outcome in the same Polymarket market group already
resolved YES on functionally identical evidence 24h earlier

So how is the same evidence chain heading to NO on Polymarket?

>UMA.rocks — a "voting committee" that publicly announces its vote
(P1 / NO) in the dispute thread while including the disclaimer "we
encourage voters to vote independently." Delegators earn 20.84% APR
for voting with the committee, displayed in their own dashboard.
This is coordinated voting with a fig leaf — opposite of anonymous
token voting. [screenshots in reply]

>Polymarket's "Additional Context" mechanism — they added a
clarification AFTER the dispute opened, narrowing what counts as
"live broadcast" to exclude pool-feed-with-delay (i.e. the entire
Fox/TVB/AP chain). Users bet against the original rule. Polymarket
resolves against a retroactive interpretation.

>One UMA proposer address: 304 proposals, 100% win rate, 0 disputes
lost. Either the resolution flow is mathematically unloseable or
someone has structural edge ordinary users don't.

Early replies (first 3)

62257394
>>62257375
indeed, it is a massive scam

62257427
>>62257375
>Per market rules, "only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution." Footage that was not broadcast live, even if filmed during the relevant events and released during market timeframe, will not qualify toward resolution.

>We’re aware of the dispute on this market. If a clarification is to be issued, it will be at 1:00 PM ET on May 15. If no statement is issued at that time, then there will be no clarification by the Polymarket team. The orderbook will be cleared at 1:00 PM ET, regardless of whether a clarification is made.
Could it be that the rules were different and you did not read them?

62257430
>>62257394
>>62257427
>>62257375
kill yourself baldie.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257458
>>62257430
Im not bald you retard. Not even a bit.

62257478
>Honduran presidential election — UMA dispute voter pushed P1 NO
with a fabricated turnout recalculation from raw papeletas data,
contradicting La Prensa, El Heraldo, the EU observation committee,
and Transparencia Electoral's final report all citing 60.19%
turnout. Vote was edited to YES only after Polymarket intervened
to correct it. UMA.rocks weight made this very nearly succeed

62257482
Did you read the problem?

62257543
https://youtu.be/rWBb5dgUgJk

62257572
The UMA is weak my brothers.....

62257574
I don't get these whales if this is true. Do they intend on killing the platform for a quick profit?

item.title: I didn't buy BTC during the 2020 crash. Now I hope it fails. — 6 replies — 7.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
I didn't buy BTC during the 2020 crash. Now I hope it fails.

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-05-21 10:51 UTC

OP

I didn't buy BTC during the 2020 crash.
Now I hope it fails.

Early replies (first 3)

62256986
bch is the real bitcoin and it's only a few hundred bucks now

62257000
>>62256975
Too much niggershit is exit pumping, maybe its your time lil bear.

62257008
I hope we go back to 100k so I can dump my bags for a 25% gain, and then saylor/tom lee get liquidated and all the "value" is destroyed to reverse inflation a bit.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257017
>>62256975
you dont have to be gay bobo

62257592
>>62256975

At least you're honest. ABBB, always be buying Bitcoin and you won't make that mistake again. If it goes up, you can say I bought it at this price, if it goes down, you're getting a deal.

You will literally never miss.

62257593
>>62256986

>bch is trash

ftfy

item.title: >Let the linkies deal in the real world These eight words so succinctly encapsulate Sergey's worldview. — 4 replies — 7.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>Let the linkies deal in the real world These eight words so succinctly encapsulate Sergey's worldview.

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-05-21 11:05 UTC

OP

>Let the linkies deal in the real world
These eight words so succinctly encapsulate Sergey's worldview. I note how hard CLL and their lackeys have pushed the rehabilitation propaganda of Sergey's public image and I think the release of that particular statement (not an accident btw) is the crème de la crème of their efforts; it resonates so much because it forces linkies to look in the mirror and realise how small, pathetic and imprisoned they are.
(((Sergey lives))); we suffer.

Early replies (first 3)

62257351
>>62257344
Whenever someone mentions the atrocious price performance of Chainlink over the past 6 years a CLL advocate (or a schizo baggie) comes up to defend Sirgay, even if he became a billionaire dumping tokens on Binance.

Weird...

62257354
>>62257344
>>62257351
Link niggers are the biggest faggots on this entire board all you pinkboy faggots are just one samenigger who whines about being sick all the time dumb faggot lol should have died.

62257510
>>62257354
stop bumping every shitty thread

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257623
>>62257354
keep bumping every based thread

item.title: TNN wasn’t a meme — 6 replies — 7.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
TNN wasn’t a meme

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-05-21 10:48 UTC

OP

Link cucks are butthurt that all their meme “partnerships” turned out to be giant nothingburgers that benefit only ChainlinkLabs while having ZERO effect on the price of the token

Early replies (first 3)

62256900
>>62256898

62256904
>>62256900

Sergey deserves a new penthouse in NYC

62256916
>>62256898

>>62256916

item.title: Are you buying cards yet? Or are you gonna cling onto LINK copium and remain a broke nocarder? — 12 replies — 6.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are you buying cards yet? Or are you gonna cling onto LINK copium and remain a broke nocarder?

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-05-21 09:51 UTC

OP

Are you buying cards yet? Or are you gonna cling onto LINK copium and remain a broke nocarder?

Early replies (first 3)

62252614
>>62252613
cards are dead. give it a rest

62252623
>>62252614
Cards have preformed EVERY other asset over the past 5 years.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62252632
>>62252623
>Tai Lopez
Lol

62252640
>>62252632
I mean, he was one of the OG finance influencers on social media, alongside Andrew Tate.

62252684
>>62252613
its really just these graded cards. it makes it so simple the average normie can easily identify it as valuable. once its in one of these encapsulated plastic things it turns it into a much more standardized, tradable asset. its basically super gold. imagine gold except wildly different levels of value to the gold and the gold also just goes up 2x-10x per year for no reason

62252716
>>62252684
Shhh...if the U.S. Government sees this, they'll dump their gold to buy cardboard.

62252718
>>62252613
Top signal?

62252733
>>62252684
have cards gone through their grading scandals yet?

coins have gone through dozens of grading scandals that called the grades and values into question and undercut the market to the point where graded coins were being smashed out of holders because they were worth more ungraded for a while.

even now most people will send the same coin in a hundred times to get the very best possible grade because grading isn't exactly a science and the grade comes back different every time

62253390
>>62252718
Bubble signal

62253498
>>62253390
If people start selling their psa 10s for $5 I will happily snap them up and sell them for a fortune in 10 yrs
But that isn't gonna happen
Gotta drop off two orders at the PO

62257420
>>62252613
kabom!

That tonight's gonna be a good night

That tonight's gonna be a good night

That tonight's gonna be a good night
